'''Neil Ross''' is a voice actor who has worked on many ''[[Star Wars]]'' video games.

{{Bio-stub}}

==Works==
===Gameography===
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing vs. TIE Fighter]]'' – Imperial Commander, Rebel Pilot #1
*[[Star Wars: Rogue Squadron (video game)|''Star Wars: Rogue Squadron'']] – [[Han Solo/Legends|Han Solo]], [[General/Legends|General]] [[Carlist Rieekan/Legends|Rieekan]], [[Kohl Seerdon]]
*''[[Star Wars: Masters of Teräs Käsi]]'' – Han Solo, [[Boba Fett/Legends|Boba Fett]], [[Jodo Kast]]
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']] – Han Solo, Stormtrooper, Imperial Command Center Communications Officer
*''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]'' – Admiral [[Nammo]], Concourse P.A. Announcer, Imperial Officer 3, Rebel Pilot 4
*''[[Star Wars: Force Commander]]'' – Han Solo, [[Tracked Shield Disabler|TR-SD]] Driver, Ruulian Computer Worker
*[[Star Wars: Starfighter (video game)|''Star Wars: Starfighter'']] – Trade Federation Officer, Rescue 3, Wingman
*''[[Star Wars: Jedi Starfighter]]'' – Wingmate 2
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic]]'' – [[Ahlan Matale]]
*''[[Star Wars: The Old Republic]]'' – Moff [[Jiak]], Colonel [[Vorgath]], [[Darth Arho]], Duke [[Horis Thul]], Guardian of the Inner Sanctum, Lord [[Kavaros]], Lord [[Ranath]], Master Sergeant [[Korum]], Republic Simulation Droid, [[Torkel Laphmer]]
